items.description: What is AirSnitch? In February 2026, security researchers at the Network and Distributed System Security (NDSS) Symposium presented a research paper entitled “AirSnitch: Demystifying and Breaking Client Isolation in Wi-Fi Networks.” AirSnitch is a collection of attacks meant to defeat client isolation. There are several distinct attacks relying on protocol level behavior or assistance from... The post AirSnitch Overview appeared first on Mist .
items.title: AirSnitch Overview
